title: Mandhardevi Kalubai temple
tagline: Mandhardevi Kalubai temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mandhardevi Kalubai temple is near Wai (Satara District, Maharashtra, India).
overview.description: Mandhardevi Kalubai temple is near Wai (Satara District, Maharashtra, India). Located on a hill 4,650 feet above sea level, the temple, some 20 km from Wai, Satara, overlooks the picturesque Pandavgad Fort and Purandar fort. Devotees attribute miraculous properties to a grove around the shrine. Local lore has it that the temple is more than 400 years old but no definite date on the construction is available.

topPlaces.name: Wai Caves
topPlaces.description: Wai Caves are 9 Buddhist Caves, situated at Lonara, 7 km north of Wai. The Chaitya hall containing a Stupa has since been converted into a Shiva temple.

topPlaces.name: Rohida fort
topPlaces.description: Rohida fort / Vichitragad Fort is a fort located 10 km from Bhor, Pune district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Pune district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mandhardevi Kalubai temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mandhardevi Kalubai temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mandhardevi Kalubai temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (54 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mandhardevi Kalubai temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mandhardevi Kalubai temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mandhardevi Kalubai temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mandhardevi Kalubai temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mandhardevi Kalubai temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Wai Caves, Rohida fort.
